description_long: This is a small, cylindrical bottle with a metallic sheen, predominantly colored in shades of brown and gold. The bottle features a green and gold screw cap and is adorned with Japanese text and branding, including a prominent red and gold label on the front. Decorative patterns encircle the neck, and the bottle's surface is glossy, reflecting light. The back and sides display additional product information, barcodes, and nutritional details in Japanese. There are visible holes and missing sections in the bottle, particularly on the upper side and back, indicating physical damage or incomplete structure.
description: A small, glossy brown and gold bottle with Japanese branding, a green screw cap, and visible surface damage.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main label with bold Japanese text, red and gold accents, and the green screw cap.
description_view_1: Side view reveals additional Japanese text, product information, and some visible holes and wear on the surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a barcode, more Japanese text, and a large missing section near the base.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view highlights a large hole near the neck and another on the lower body, with visible label details.
attribute_label_or_branding: Japanese text in gold and white on the front, red and gold label with additional Japanese writing, barcode and product information on the back, all in a bold, commercial style.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: Large holes and missing sections on the upper and lower body, with visible surface wear.
